response.justification: Sarah Smith has strong full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript and Node.js, including recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, which aligns closely with the GenAI and cloud requirements. However, her experience with Python is limited (mostly TypeScript/JavaScript), and there's no clear evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent system frameworks. Her AI-related work appears recent and less prominent than her broader software engineering background.
strengths: Recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers at re:cinq
Strong full-stack engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven leadership in technical domains, including dev-ops, CI/CD, and mentoring (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course)
concerns: Limited Python experience, which is a core requirement for the role
No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)
AI-related work is recent (2025) and may not reflect deep expertise in GenAI systems
